feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Error while hybrid testing xsuaa
entry.content:
I am getting the following error while hybrid testing of xsuaa with the command "cds bind --exec -- npm start --prefix app/router"

#2.0#2024 07 23 06:16:08:254#+00:00#INFO#/Auth/OAuth2#####1a570975-e3b0-46c5-9ab7-24a0de27345a####Jqmab6crIGGyZ_n8aT0wfn8ZbDbwgRpm######1a570975-e3b0-46c5-9ab7-24a0de27345a#PLAIN##query does not exist for request url /app/index.html#
#2.0#2024 07 23 06:16:08:254#+00:00#INFO#/Auth/OAuth2#####1a570975-e3b0-46c5-9ab7-24a0de27345a####Jqmab6crIGGyZ_n8aT0wfn8ZbDbwgRpm######1a570975-e3b0-46c5-9ab7-24a0de27345a#PLAIN##sending page with client-side redirect to https://7d2927dbtrial.authentication.us10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/authorize?response_type=code&client_id=sb-usertestrepeat!t309561&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fport5000-workspaces-ws-xl8wd.us10.trial.applicationstudio.cloud.sap%2Flogin%2Fcallback#
#2.0#2024 07 23 06:16:08:254#+00:00#INFO#/Auth/OAuth2#####1a570975-e3b0-46c5-9ab7-24a0de27345a####Jqmab6crIGGyZ_n8aT0wfn8ZbDbwgRpm######1a570975-e3b0-46c5-9ab7-24a0de27345a#PLAIN##x-forwarded-path header: undefined#

 I'm not sure what it means when it says "query does not exist for /app/index.html".

I've added the oauth2 redirect uris as adviced in the authentication section of capire, xsuaa hybrid-testing.

I'm not sure what i am doing wrong here.

Also following is the screen i get when i run my "cds bind --exec -- npm start --prefix app/router" command.

entry.title: Request failed with status code 503. Change logging level to debug your issue
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I face this issue.

 

I followed this  https://github.com/SAP/open-ux-tools/tree/main/packages/deploy-tooling#configuration-with-logging-enabled  and tried with log: 5 and verbose: true  in my ui5.yaml but it is the same.

 

ui5.yaml file

 

 

specVersion: "3.1"
metadata:
  name: logoutplugin
type: application
server:
  customMiddleware:
    - name: fiori-tools-proxy
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        ignoreCertError: false # If set to true, certificate errors will be ignored. E.g. self-signed certificates will be accepted
        ui5:
          path:
            - /resources
            - /test-resources
          url: https://ui5.sap.com
    - name: fiori-tools-appreload
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        port: 35729
        path: webapp
        delay: 300
    - name: fiori-tools-preview
      afterMiddleware: fiori-tools-appreload
      configuration:
        component: logoutplugin
        ui5Theme: sap_horizon

 

 

Have someone an idea to solve it? 

Thank You.

entry.title: Q) How to create API services and use them in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Question

I want to practice creating APIs in the API Services tab of the Manage Service Registry App. However, it is difficult to develop a service that goes into URL/Path.

I'd like to have basic and sequential examples and guides. If possible, I would like to use the Visual Studio Code as IDE for service development.

Furthermore, where can we use custom API if it is possible to create them? Does creating API mean custom APIs are uploaded to the endpoint and possible to use like provided-APIs during plugin development?

 

FYI, Background

I''m a beginner of SAP Digital Manufacturing and IT. I've developed few view-plugs with SAPUI5 and Visual Studio Code(IDE) and expanded them to DM POD. The plugins I made can get or post with provided APIs. I uploaded my custom POD to BTP sub-account and registered that route in the UI Extension tab of the Manage Service Registry. I've only developed plug-ins in the view format.

 

Kind regards,

SAP Digital Manufacturing

entry.title: Could you please reactivate open sap course "SAP Cloud Platform Version Control with Git"?
entry.content: The open sap course "SAP Cloud Platform Version Control with Git" was a great introduction to the learning of Git. Although it was based on git usage over SAP Web IDE, the fundamentals of Git were greatly introduced by Arnaldo Cavazos. Please, reactivate open sap course "SAP Cloud Platform Version Control with Git".

entry.title: Deployment has failed. Request failed with status code 403
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I face this issue.

I followed this     https://github.com/SAP/open-ux-tools/tree/main/packages/deploy-tooling#configuration-with-logging-enabled   but still have the error. Yesterday was the error status code 503, today without changing anything I got status code 403.

 

Have someone any idea? With detailed explanation please.

 

Thank you

Mahmood

entry.title: Left join merged dimensions (SOLVED)
entry.content:
=================
Solved by proper used of "detail" objects to build the merged dataset
=================

I don’t do merged dimensions much, but I have the mechanics working but I’m not getting a left join.

I have 744 records in Query A with 742 matches in Query B. But I want to see the blanks for the 2 missing records. Right now it’s only doing an INNER JOIN so only 742 display.

In table properties, I’ve checked “Show rows with empty dimension values”, but it’s not doing that.

=====
not sure how to tag this for Business Objects ... 🤔

entry.title: Hello CAP community, Can you please suggest a correct way to implement same logic as LIKE operator.
entry.content:
entity orderDetails @(restrict: [
                        { grant: ['READ'], to: 'Viewer', where: 'companyCode LIKE '%RW%''},
                        { grant: ['WRITE'], to: 'Admin' }
                        ]) as projection on da.orderDetails ;
}

entry.title: Question: Read Parameters From Each POD and Custom Plug-in
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I'm a newbie who just started SAP DM. I registered and added few custom UI plug-ins developed with VS Code on the POD as a pop-up. The plugins can specify and import the data which they need via API from DMC, but I haven't succeeded to make information-interaction between the plugins and the POD yet.


Question:

 

1. Can the plug-in receive(read) data such as the number, resource, and quantity of the selected SFC of the POD as a parameter and display it on the plug-in page? I would like to spread POD selected SFC's information on the custom UI plug-ins.


2. Conversely, can the values in the custom plug-in be used in POD or PPD? For example, POD message, etc..


How can POD and external UI plugins transit data to each other? When I put the plug in on a Production Process Design, in configuration of it, it wasn't able to input any parameters. 

 

If there is a way to do, please explain it easily.

SAP Digital Manufacturing 

Best regards,

entry.title: Adaptation Project - Failed to load UI5 component #app-preview
entry.content:
I have created an adaptation project With f3302 app, I get the following messages when I run option preview application in manifest.appdescr_variant file.

Please see the attachment.

Regards

entry.title: Save draft to document in approval document
entry.content:
Dear All,

 I have issues to save draft to document in the approval document have batch and Bin allocate error (-10) Invalid "SerialAndBatchNumbersBaseLine"; specify a valid "SerialAndBatchNumbersBaseLine" when I using DI API.

My Code 

if(oDraft.GetByKey(Draft_Entry))

{

           oDraft.SaveDraftToDocument()

}

Thanks you

entry.title: Error: Authentication kind "xsuaa" configured, but no XSUAA instance bound to application. Either
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

Could you someone help me with this error.

Case: I was create a destination for my cap service. I need to connect this with my ui5 app. This configurations return 200. But this does not get metadata.

When i try to connect from service explore to destination or postman. this return 500 but my service works well, I supposed that the problem is related with mi auth config, but when i test my cap app locally return error when thi try to connect to my external odata SAP.

Destination status

Error: Cannot connect to the service. Check the log for more information.

Testing locally.

Best regards,

Angel

entry.title: Error during request to remote service: Failed to load destination.
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

Could you someone assist me with this error.

Case: I'm consume external odata in my CAP project. When i get the entities, it return this error.

Error: Error during request to remote service: Failed to load destination.

Best regards,

Angel

entry.title: wrap label in sap ui5
entry.content:
in annotation.cds file, i am trying to wrap label. 

 

    UI.LineItem : [
        {
            $Type : 'UI.DataField',
            Label : 'Leading Functional Features Ranking within Industry/Region',
           
            @HTML5.CssDefaults: { width: '7em' },
            Value : FeatureID,
        },

entry.title: how to make a text field with drop down with static values
entry.content:
how to make a Region text field as a drop down with static values as APJ,NAMER, EMEA,MEE.

below is the field type created in cds file. 

entity Interactions_Items {

    key INTHeader : association to Interactions_Header;
    key TEXT_ID : BusinessKey;
        FeatureDescription : LText;
         Region : String(20);
        NETWORKID:LText;
       
};

entry.title: Why is an empty page already full of errors and depricated stuff when generated in BAS?
entry.content:
When generating a new page from template and just executing the empty page there are alraedy errors in the browser log.

For example: 

this really makes it difficult to find own errors. Since it is a continuosly updated cloud based "solution" I would expect that the wizards generating a new page are kept somewhat up to date.

entry.title: how to remove additional fields from Adapt filters?
entry.content: how to remove additional fields from Adapt filters?

entry.title: SAP CDS service does not display data even though it exist.
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

If I deploy my application locally then in temporary port it displays data in the endpoints which do exists in the database explorer.

SS-1 :

Temporary Port:

DB Explorer Data Exist:

But once we deploy this then service created in dev space in my BTP account does not display any data in it.

Is this issue with CDS 7 ?

Note: I'm using {"auth":"mocked"} in the package.json;

Also note that even if I use xsuaa authentication then also after authentication data is not getting populated.

Can anyone help me understand what is error? or If I'm missing anything here?

With xsuaa authentication no data fetched; tested it in postman. Refer the screen shot.

My 'package.json' for reference is:

 

{
  "name": "IT_CHARM",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "A simple CAP project.",
  "repository": "<Add your repository here>",
  "license": "UNLICENSED",
  "engine": {
    "node": "^12 || ^14"
  },
  "private": true,
  "dependencies": {
    "@sap/cds": "^7",
    "@sap/cds-hana": "^2",
    "@sap/xssec": "^4",
    "express": "^4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@cap-js/sqlite": "^1",
    "@sap/cds-dk": "^7",
    "@sap/eslint-plugin-cds": "^3",
    "eslint": "^9"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "start": "cds-serve"
  },
  "cds": {
    "build": {
      "tasks": [
        {
          "for": "hana",
          "dest": "../db"
        },
        {
          "for": "node-cf"
        }
      ]
    },
    "requires": {
      "db": {
        "kind": "hana-cloud"
      },
      "auth":"mocked"
    }
  }
}

 

 

Regards,

Ganesh N.

entry.title: Destination return 401: Unauthorized
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

could you someone assist me with this error 401: Unauthorized ?

I created a destination for my cap service. I build cap and ui5 apps by separate. 

When I try to connect from my app ui5 the destination does not load .

 

Best regards,

Angel Gutierrez

entry.title: Use multiple data sources in FIORI App in Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hi Experts;

We performed below actions in Business Application Studio:

1.- We create a Basic freestyle FIORI App from a template, selecting a Data source as Use a Local CAP Project.

2.- The FIORI App works as expected when the service is exposed from backend node.js 

3.- Now, in the same FIORI App we want to post data to on premise SAP system, the connections are successful in the same subaccount cloud connector and destination. We added the required service from the service center of BAS it generated cds and js files of the entity in srv folder but when we try to hit the service we are facing the 502 error: Failed to load destination error. 

4.- Other Alternative tried is adding the service in manifest.json file but the metadata is failing saying error code 404: Service Not found.

we tried creating a new project from the service center instead of adding to existing CAP Project the new project created is working fine all the metadata is loading and the data is fetched from the on premise system.

Now we are trying to access multiple data sources one from the local CAP Project and another service from destination in BTP Cockpit

Any guidance, in general, is welcome.

Thanks in advance.

Rahul L.

entry.title: Consuming External Service Onpremise in SAP CAP using Principal Propagantion
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

My instance <app>-srv returns error when I try to consume my CAP service and this calls odata onpremise using Principal Propagation, I notice my instance <app>-router connect get data but I can not use this because connection by destiantion  It is not work 

The destination works very well with UI5 and CAP is not returned this error when I use Basic Authentication.

 

502 -Error during request to remote service: Request failed with status code 401

Best regards,

Angel Gutierrez
